message:
feat(serialize): add SafeTensors format support and fix workspace clippy warnings

Add HuggingFace-compatible SafeTensors save/load for state dicts with F64/F32/F16/BF16
dtype support, metadata read/write, and byte-level round-trip. Includes 10 new tests.
Also fixes pre-existing clippy warnings across ft-kernel-cpu, ft-autograd, ft-api,
ft-nn, ft-data, and ft-serialize (redundant closures, needless range loops, manual
div_ceil, implicit saturating_sub, dead code, map_clone).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
